_comment: 0.7.25 — parent re-routed from first_pvp_win → ranch_carrot_farm to visually gate Gym 2 behind the Exeggcute / Cobbleworkers onboarding chain. RCT itself doesn't enforce gym order, so this is purely UI / tree-rendering; players who beat gym 2 before completing the carrot-farm quest still get credit (the advancement awards on its own criterion regardless of parent state).
